texto: She fancied herself superiour to her surroundings: surely there were higher things to live for. Yet the ugliness of this room was but a part of what she felt to be the dreariness of all life outside of books.
explicacao: Citação de Helen Dawes Brown sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “She fancied herself superiour to her surroundings: surely there were higher things to live for. Y…” articula reflexao, books, fancied em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
